# Legal text — VERBATIM, do not edit without counsel

- `tcpa-consent.txt` — captured character-for-character from the live site's signup form
  (2026-07-19). This is the TCPA "express written consent" language (07 §4). The lead form
  displays it verbatim, and `/api/lead` logs this exact string with each submission as the
  consent ledger entry. **Any change requires Jungle Boys counsel review.**
- `cannabis-warning.txt` — government warning language from the live site footer.
- License numbers (CA): C10-0000125-LIC, C10-0000103-LIC, C10-0000904-LIC, C10-0001146-LIC,
  C12-0000542-LIC — displayed in footer + with the signup form.
